MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,550.00 FILED BY CAMACHO-MARINEZ, ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT EBAY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
